objective: Run the repo-native Stage 6 closeout hook for completed Secret Provisioning UX epic #507 after all child issues and implementation PRs merged.
scope_boundary: Convert the existing #507 closeout summary into the full Stage 6 template.
Run the existing closeout hook to refresh graph/wiki evidence.
Move the closed #507 backlog row from active work to completed history.
out_of_scope: New secret provisioning tools or scanners.
Credential handling, secret rotation, generated env files, signed URLs, Authorization headers, raw phone numbers, or screenshots.
Changing the Secret Provisioning UX contract already merged through #509-#513.
research_summary: Epic #507 and child issues #508-#513 are closed, and PR #528 merged the rollout inventory and closeout summary. The remaining gap is the repo-native Stage 6 hook/write-back step, which this issue-backed closeout lane performs using existing closeout, validation, graph, and wiki mechanisms.

sprints.name: Stage 6 closeout write-back
sprints.goal: Produce durable Stage 6 closeout evidence for epic #507 without expanding tooling scope.
tasks: Create issue #529 plan, scope, handoff, packet, validation, and review artifacts.
Rewrite the #507 closeout artifact in the full Stage 6 template.
Run validate_closeout.py and hooks/closeout-hook.sh against the #507 closeout.
Run Local CI Gate and publish the PR with automerge when checks pass.
acceptance_criteria: The closeout artifact links #507, #508-#513, issue #529, PRs #516-#528, and downstream follow-up issues.
The closeout artifact validates with scripts/overlord/validate_closeout.py.
hooks/closeout-hook.sh runs successfully and commits graph/wiki write-back.
The Local CI Gate passes before PR publication.
No downstream repo files or secret-bearing evidence are modified.

specialist_reviews.focus: Verify the completed #507 epic should reuse the existing Stage 6 closeout hook instead of introducing a new closeout surface.
specialist_reviews.summary: Confirmed #507 was closed after #528, while the hook-generated graph/wiki write-back still needed a dedicated issue-backed lane.

alternate_model_review.summary: This is a closeout evidence and graph/wiki write-back lane; it does not change standards, architecture, or implementation behavior.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Write only issue #529 closeout evidence, backlog/progress mirrors, and hook-generated graph/wiki outputs.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Run closeout validation, closeout hook, Local CI Gate, and publish the PR.

material_deviation_rules: If downstream repository changes appear necessary, stop and open or update a downstream issue instead of editing those repos.
If the closeout hook generates unexpected broad churn outside graph/wiki outputs, inspect and keep only Stage 6-authorized artifacts.
If validation finds a policy defect beyond closeout evidence, create or update a separate governance issue.
